current_default_chain_note: Historical ABCD input schema retained for compatibility. Current default deployment candidate is ABD integrated / ABD_SAFE.
model_c_gate: Historical/experimental only: Model C may participate only when model_b_label == ECG_GOOD. Current default ABD_SAFE deployment does not depend on Model C.
safety_boundary: No medical diagnosis output. A/B provide quality gates, D_SAFE/ABD Fusion provides model-assisted engineering state evidence, and firmware Fusion arbitration generates final trust/UI state.
